reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, WASM) + runner evidence

rubric.evidence: Real WASM inference verified end-to-end in headless Chrome: first-visit Download → onnx-community/vitpose-base-simple (q8, ~87MB) → 17/17 COCO keypoints on a person, 525ms, skeleton drawn on canvas. Also verified in Node: VitPoseForPoseEstimation, heatmaps [1,17,64,48]. conformance loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass.

Output is 17 COCO keypoints (x,y in image px) + per-joint confidence + bbox, decoded from per-joint 64x48 heatmaps via arg-max (verified: id2label Nose/L_Eye/R_Eye…, scores 0.6–0.9 on a clear person). See-inside renders the real heatmap with the arg-max circled. Semantically correct.
rubric.notes: Agent-confirmed real output; no longer just manual-pending.

rubric.evidence: conformance 5✓: declares-model-id (onnx-community/vitpose-base-simple), declares-task (keypoint-detection), declares-backend (WASM), declares-quantisation (q8), inference-off-main-thread (Web Worker) all pass. Loader detail confirmed the exact model id in-browser.

Uses shared createModelLoader (conformance shared-auto-init-loader=pass). Verified in-browser: first visit shows Download (no silent large download), post-download auto-inits to ready with the accessible checking→initialising→ready status; Clear-cached-model control present.

conformance live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass. Download progress + Retry path present (worker/loader surface failures as .err status). WASM path runs with no WebGPU; console + network clean in the verified run.
rubric.notes: Offline-cached + eviction paths not exhaustively re-exercised this pass.

rubric.evidence: Every visible control operable + keyboard-accessible: sample thumbs (role=button, Enter/Space), dropzone (role=button + file input), Detect button, confidence range slider (input event re-renders), keypoint <select> for the heatmap. Verified on desktop + mobile screenshots.

All visible output (skeleton, per-keypoint confidence table, heatmap) is produced by the on-device model run; no canned results. The multi-model page draws 8 genuinely-distinct poses from detector→ViTPose (verified).

conformance images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. Canvas has a descriptive aria-label (guidance expose-canvas-content-to-browser-features); status is role=status aria-live; slider + select are labelled; focus-visible rings on interactive elements.

conformance responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass. Agent read desktop (1280x800) + mobile (360x740, DPR3) screenshots: no horizontal overflow, no clipped controls, legible text; flex field-rows wrap; canvas uses inline-size:100% + max-block-size (guidance css-layout).

Inference runs off the main thread in a Web Worker (heatmaps transferred, not copied); control UI stays responsive during the ~525ms estimate. INP not formally traced but no blocking main-thread loop (guidance break-up-long-tasks).
rubric.notes: Multi-model page runs up to 8 sequential crops off-thread; capped at MAX_PEOPLE=8 to bound work.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel canvas image overlay without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Flexbox with flex-wrap:wrap + flex-basis and min-inline-size:0; intrinsic sizing + aspect-ratio for media; logical properties; avoid fixed widths that overflow.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — field-rows use flex-wrap; canvas is inline-size:100% block-size:auto max-block-size:64vh; sliders flex:1 1 180px min-inline-size:0. No horizontal overflow on either class (verified).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-check desktop+mobile clean; screenshots reviewed reports/responsive/screens/vitpose-pose/

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Move heavy synchronous work off the main thread / yield so inference doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all model loading + inference run in a Web Worker; heatmaps returned as a transferable Float32Array.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance inference-off-main-thread=pass; UI responsive during verified 525ms run

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible range slider and form controls
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Native labelled form controls, visible focus, live regions for status, keyboard operation.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — labelled slider with <output>, role=status aria-live, keyboard handlers on custom role=button samples/dropzone, focus-visible outlines.

guidanceConsulted.query: draw overlay on image with canvas responsive
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Give canvas an accessible name/description so its rendered content is exposed to assistive tech.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the result canvas has aria-label describing the drawn skeleton; the heatmap canvas is labelled too.

openQuestions: Offline-cached and cache-eviction states are handled by the shared loader but were not exhaustively re-exercised this pass.
On low-memory mobile devices the 87MB q8 model loads, but end-to-end latency on such devices was not measured.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a live-webcam pose rung to ViTPose (real-time top-down estimation per frame with a person detector), as a NEW additive demo page.
Add a fp16/WebGPU path for ViTPose to cut per-crop latency on capable devices, keeping the WASM q8 default.

summary: Revision-2 critique for vitpose-pose (keypoint-detection, WASM q8). Real inference verified end-to-end in headless Chrome (17/17 keypoints, 525ms) and Node (VitPoseForPoseEstimation, heatmap→arg-max decode); multi-model detector→ViTPose produced 8 distinct poses. Layout clean on desktop+mobile with no overflow; controls keyboard-accessible; console+network clean. All four modern-web-guidance topics consulted and applied.
